abort.configure_via_addon: Configure the EspToolkit add-on (Settings → Add-ons → EspToolkit → Configuration): set the API token and ensure the add-on is running. The integration will be set up automatically.

init.title: Mac SDL simulator (optional)
init.description: Mac sim agent token: shared secret for the Mac program that connects outbound to Home Assistant (not the add-on API token). Mac sim API encryption key: used only in the SDL build so Home Assistant sees a separate device named macsim (auto-generated on first Mac sim if left empty). Paste the key when adding the macsim device under Settings → Devices & services → ESPHome.
